title: Vera Bradley Inc - CNBC Stock Data
text: Vera Bradley (NASDAQ: VRA) is a leading designer and marketer of smart, fashionable and innovative women's lifestyle products. The company trades on the NASDAQ exchange as VRA. Recent analyst consensus for next quarter's earnings estimates -$0.33 earnings per share, indicating expected losses in the near term. Company serves multiple distribution channels including direct-to-consumer and indirect wholesale channels.
